description: Baseline: harness-validation feature with 8 artifacts. artifact_coverage=1.0, schema_compliance=1.0, state_alignment=1.0, phase_coverage=0.857, evidence_quality=0.375. Evidence quality is the main gap — evidence refs not resolving relative to feature dir.

asi.next_action: fix evidence ref path resolution in score_workflow.sh to correctly resolve refs relative to feature dir; re-score
deferred_ideas: add auto-generated run-history.md alongside JSON
add lint check for state drift between state.md and state.json
add schema validation using ajv node module for strict validation

description: Fixed evidence ref path resolution in score_workflow.sh (unquoted heredoc, FD variable). Evidence quality: 0→1.0. All 12 evidence refs now resolve correctly. quality_score: 0.62→0.98. Only gap is phase_coverage at 0.8571 (INTAKE skipped, correct for small features).

asi.weakest_component: phase_coverage=0.8571 (INTAKE not in run-history; acceptable for small feature)
improvements_made: fixed bash heredoc quoting bug - FEATURE_DIR_ABS was literal string in JS
added proper path resolution: feature dir + repo root + stripped prefix
asi.next_action: Add INTAKE phase to run-history.json OR update eval.md to accept SPECIFY as valid start for small features
deferred_ideas: add ajv JSON Schema validation (strict mode)
add state drift linter
add auto-run score_workflow.sh as part of VERIFY gate
create CI check: score_workflow.sh must pass before commit

description: Perfect score! Fixed missing REPORT phase in run-history.json (was REVIEW→FINISH, now REVIEW→REPORT→FINISH). All 8 artifacts present, 8 runs documented, all phases covered, all evidence refs valid, state aligned. Workflow validated as sound.

asi.key_finding: Scoring script caught missing REPORT phase — workflow quality gate working correctly
weaknesses_found: score_workflow.sh bash heredoc needed unquoted for FEATURE_DIR_ABS expansion
INTAKE is optional for small features (eval.md clarified)
REPORT phase was missing from run-history despite report.md being created
asi.next_action: Now that baseline is perfect (1.0), next iteration should introduce a KNOWN BUG in the workflow to test if scoring can detect regressions
deferred_ideas: add ajv strict JSON Schema validation
add state drift linter (auto-detect state.md vs state.json drift)
create CI pre-commit hook: score_workflow.sh must run before git commit
document the 3 bugs caught during validation

description: Regression test PASSED: introduced rollback_target drift, scoring caught it (1.0→0.95), fixed, restored to 1.0. Added ajv strict validation and state drift detection eval (EVAL-006).

asi.regression_test: PASSED - scoring caught rollback_target drift, dropped quality 1.0->0.95, auto-restored on fix
bugs_caught_during_dev: bash heredoc quoting: << 'EOF' prevented FEATURE_DIR_ABS expansion -> FD was literal string in JS
regex **? is invalid in JS regex (quantifier on quantifier)
mdExtract defined inside try block not accessible from module-level state alignment section
missing REPORT phase in run-history.json despite report.md existing
asi.next_action: Create CI pre-commit hook: score_workflow.sh; document bugs as case study; package score_workflow.sh as standalone tool
deferred_ideas: package score_workflow.sh as a standalone npm tool for community use
add autorollback: if quality drops, automatically revert last commit

description: Added CI pre-commit hook (scripts/pre-commit-quality-check.sh) and EVAL-007 for ci_hook. Complete rewrite of score_workflow.sh with 7 evals: artifact_coverage, schema_compliance (ajv strict), state_alignment, state_drift, phase_coverage, evidence_quality, ci_hook. All at 1.0. Pre-commit hook auto-detected by scoring script.

workflow_improvements: ci pre-commit hook auto-runs score_workflow.sh on staged feature artifacts
ajv strict JSON schema validation for run-history.json and state.json
state drift detection catches field mismatches between state.md and state.json
asi.next_action: Install the pre-commit hook in the harness repo; update installer to auto-install the hook; create docs/ci-integration.md
deferred_ideas: add autorollback when quality drops below threshold
create score_workflow.sh as standalone npm package
add harness-lint: checks spec.md for required REQ-* IDs and eval.md for required EVAL-* IDs

description: Installer updated to include scripts/ in ASSETS_FULL and ASSETS_ADAPTED. Created docs/ci-integration.md explaining pre-commit hook installation, usage, and what each eval validates. Quality score maintained at 1.0 across all 7 evals.

docs/ci-integration.md created: explains pre-commit hook, installation, evals table, skip procedure

description: Added EVAL-008: spec structure validation (sections present, REQ/EVAL ID sequencing, eval ref validity). Fixed duplicate EVAL ID detection using Set. Complete scoring framework: 8 evals, all at 1.0. Key bug fixed during dev: duplicate EVAL-007 mentioned in EVAL-008 notes caused ID non-sequential detection.

bugs_fixed: bash heredoc quoting: << 'EOF' prevented FD expansion -> literal string
regex **? invalid in JS (quantifier on quantifier)

orphaned duplicate mdExtract code left after refactoring
